mapper.select:
SELECT du.id AS dataUnionId, du.result_name AS resultName, du.other_organ_id as otherOrganId, du.tag as unionTag, dut.id as taskId, dut.task_id as taskIdName, dt.task_name as taskName, dt.task_start_time as taskStart, dt.task_end_time as taskEnd, dut.task_state as taskState, dut.ascription as ascription, dut.create_date as createDate FROM data_union du, data_union_task dut LEFT JOIN data_task dt ON dut.task_id = dt.task_id_name WHERE du.id = dut.union_id
ORDER BY du.id desc LIMIT #{offset},#{pageSize}
SELECT count(du.id) FROM data_union du, data_union_task dut WHERE du.id = dut.union_id

SELECT id,union_id as unionId,task_id as taskId,task_state as taskState,ascription,ascription_type as ascriptionType,file_path filePath,file_content fileContent,create_date createDate FROM data_union_task WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id,union_id as unionId,task_id as taskId,task_state as taskState,ascription,ascription_type as ascriptionType,file_path filePath,file_content fileContent,create_date createDate FROM data_union_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

select id,own_organ_id as ownOrganId,own_resource_id as ownResourceId,own_keyword as ownKeyword, other_organ_id as otherOrganId,other_resource_id as otherResourceId,other_keyword as otherKeyword, output_file_path_type as outputFilePathType,output_no_repeat as outputNoRepeat,tag as tag, result_name as resultName,output_format as outputFormat,result_organ_ids as resultOrganIds, remarks,user_id as userId,create_date as createDate,tee_organ_id as teeOrganId from data_union where id = #{id}
